title: OOH Order
description: An OOH advertising order, derived from the IAB Tech Lab OpenDirect-OOH Order object. Represents the buyer-publisher contract that groups one or more lines targeting Clear Channel inventory.

AccountId.description: Identifier of the account (advertiser/buyer) owning the order.

AdvertiserBrandId.description: Identifier of the AdvertiserBrand being advertised.

Name.description: Display name of the order. Must be unique.

Budget.description: Estimated budget for the order. Directional only; not a hard cap.

Currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used across the order and its lines.

Industry.description: Industry associated with this order (may differ from advertiser default).
